mapper.select: SELECT D.RATE_NM ,C.SOC ,D.BASE_AMT ,D.RATE_CD FROM MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT@DL_MSP A , MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT_RATE@DL_MSP B , MSP_TRIPLE_PRMT_ADD@DL_MSP C , MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP D WHERE A.PRMT_ID = B.PRMT_ID AND B.PRMT_ID = C.PRMT_ID AND C.SOC = D.RATE_CD AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.STRT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(A.END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.RATE_CD = #{rateCd}
